01 — About

Crafting code with
purpose & precision

Hey, I'm Fabian Munga — a passionate developer based in Nairobi, Kenya, building things for the web that are both functional and beautiful. I care deeply about the intersection of design and engineering.

From architecting robust backend APIs to crafting responsive, animated frontends, I bring a full-stack mindset to every project. Great software isn't just working code — it's experiences that feel intuitive and alive.

When I'm not coding, I'm exploring new technologies, vibing on rooftops, and staying curious about the ever-evolving world of software.
